content: Harmonic voice shipped (PR #63, v0.31.0, feat/harmonic-voice): Reachy speaks non-TTS melodies via harmonics-cli>=0.8 (AgentCulture pkg, import name harmonics — the bare PyPI harmonics dist is an unrelated squatter). reachy/speech/harmonic.py (synthesize -> PCM16 @16kHz, raw text in so *emphasis* becomes musical stress; identity reachy = root 64/pulse) + reachy/speech/voice.py resolver (flag > REACHY_VOICE_ENGINE > tts). Built via full devague chain incl. /challenge (probes: 17 words render 0.085s @16kHz) + workforce (8 sonnet agents/4 waves, TDD merges, suite 1668->1742) + /deviate d1 (3 numpy-only base-dep guard tests updated: test_export_decoupling, test_sleep_boundary, test_listen_live). DEPLOY GOTCHAS: (1) box units run from uv tool env ~/.local/share/uv/tools/reachy-mini-cli/ — refresh with uv tool install --force /path[daemon]; (2) machine-local panel.conf drop-in OVERRIDES live ExecStart (pipes --export - to reTerminal bridge) — flags must be added THERE, service enable alone is not enough; flag > env so REACHY_VOICE_ENGINE=tts cannot revert a baked flag; (3) USB enumeration moved Reachy audio to card 2, ~/.asoundrc now refs hw:Audio,0 BY NAME (backups *.bak-20260717). Live-conversation confirm + PR merge were pending at session end.

Agent-cognition frame (2026-07-17): muse (Gemma-4-31B via thor) initially failed tool use AND audio-in -> cortex pinned as main agent (probe-verified structured tool_calls; llm.py already sends enable_thinking:false). UPDATE same day: lobes-cli#139 partially landed — muse tool use NOW WORKS (structured tool_calls, finish_reason=tool_calls); audio-in still 400s (served NVFP4 lacks audio tower). Deviation d1 approved: t10 parametrizes the round-trip test over cortex+muse, muse becomes an optional agent model via REACHY_OPENAI_MODEL_ID, cortex stays verified fallback. Decisions: stashed behaviors LibraryEntry-shaped only; fetched behaviors drive the live MotionQueue goto path.
